title: ComputerConf
description: Schema for ComputerConf in Nuix ECC REST API

keepAliveInterval.description: frequency (sec) a client sends a keep-alive request to the server

keepAliveTimeout.description: time (sec) a client will wait for a response from the last keep-alive request

resourceWaitTime.description: time (sec) a client will wait for a given resource (e.g. network share)

jobWaitTime.description: frequency (sec) a client polls the server for new jobs (fallback to publish/subscribe)

startJobsWaitTime.description: time (sec) to delay a job from starting

statusUpdateWaitTime.description: frequency (sec) which a client to reports status of a running job

systemInfoUpdateWaitTime.description: frequency (sec) which a client to reports current system info

minPortRange.description: beginning of the TCP port range used for Deploy or Relocate jobs

maxPortRange.description: end of the TCP port range used for Deploy or Relocate jobs

enableLogs.description: true if diagnostic logging is enabled

throttleOutput.description: true if out should be throttled

maxBandwidthMbps.description: max bandwidth (in Mbps) allowed if output is throttled

altDestination.description: The path to an alternate destination if a primary job destination is unreachable

altDestHasCredentials.description: Whether the alternate destination requires credentials to access
